title: 🔥BTC.D逆势攀升，山寨流动性彻底枯竭
body: 市场处于极度避险的存量博弈期。BTC下探至$66,168（7日跌5.2%），核心结构指标BTC.D却逆势攀升至58.5%。这0.4%的7日涨幅揭示残酷现实：存量资金正全面退守BTC避险，山寨板块流动性被彻底抽干。同时200日定投成本高达$91,306，价格偏离达-27.5%，长线筹码深度套牢。资金结构严重畸形，整体判断偏空。这种极限吸血行情还能维持多久？
title_en: 🔥 BTC.D defies gravity as altcoin liquidity completely evaporates
body_en: The market is in a hyper risk-off, zero-sum phase. BTC dumped to $66,168 (-5.2% on the 7D chart), yet the core structural metric—BTC.D—climbed against the grain to 58.5%. That 0.4% 7D jump exposes a brutal truth: existing capital is fleeing to the BTC safe haven, bleeding the altcoin market completely dry. Meanwhile, the 200-day DCA basis is parked way up at $91,306. With price deviating -27.
